channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The latest Matter update improves camera streaming
item.description: The Connectivity Standards Alliance (CSA) released Matter 1.5.1 today, building upon the camera and video doorbell support added as part of the Matter 1.5 update last November. Although 1.5.1 is a minor update, it brings several improvements that will benefit both end users and companies making these types of devices. The most notable update is […]

item.title: The New ‘Backrooms’ Trailer Is Packed Full of Endless Dread
item.description: Chiwetel Ejiofor and Renate Reinsve star in Kane Parson's new horror movie based on his viral YouTube series.

item.title: PS5 Slim, Garmin Enduro 3 et vidéoprojecteur 4K : voici les meilleures promos high‑tech du jour
item.description: Mardi 31 mars 2026 réserve de très belles opportunités pour ceux qui cherchent à s’équiper sans exploser leur budget.

item.title: Whoop’s valuation just tripled to $10 billion
item.description: The fitness tracking startup just closed a $575 million Series G with Cristiano Ronaldo and LeBron James among its investors. The obvious question looming over a round of this size at this valuation: Is an IPO coming?

item.title: Keep your files protected: 1TB Samsung T9 Portable SSD gets a welcome price cut for World Backup Day
item.description: 1TB Samsung T9 Portable SSD with up to 2000MB/s speeds gets a welcome discount for World Backup Day.

item.title: How to watch Sweden vs Poland for FREE: live streams for World Cup Qualifier 2026
item.description: Here’s how to watch Sweden vs Poland as they face off in the Path B World Cup qualifying final.

item.title: The Best Time to Drink Coffee for Productivity (and When Not To)
item.description: Caffeine is the original biohack for energy, focus, and alertness. But are you doing it wrong?

item.title: DoorDash partners with Rivian spinoff Also for autonomous delivery vehicles
item.description: DoorDash's autonomous delivery plans will get an assist from the Rivian spinoff Also. On Tuesday, the companies announced a strategic partnership in which the delivery company will invest in Also. They intend to "develop and accelerate deployment of autonomous delivery at scale."The companies didn't specify which micromobility vehicles will be used. Also, which Rivian spun off as a separate company in 2025, is currently focused on models that combine pedals and motorized assist.Also's first commercial product is the $3,500 TM-B e-bike with a virtual drivetrain. Seemingly more tailored to DoorD...

item.title: This roguelike coin pusher game has all the addictive fun of the arcade without wasting your pocket money
item.description: Raccoin is a new roguelike indie title that finally lets you beat the endless arcade game.

item.title: Liquids Crack With an Audible Snap, Study Finds
item.description: The observations were so unbelievable that the researchers needed to repeat the experiments to "make sure it was real.”

item.title: Crimson Desert Kliff actor reveals his character changed a lot during development and he had to push Pearl Abyss for clarity — 'I just kept pushing and pushing and pushing about story and character as much as I could'
item.description: Alec Newman, the voice behind Crimson Desert's protagonist, Kliff, has revealed how he had to keep pushing Pearl Abyss for clarity on the game's story and his character during the many years of development.

item.title: Uber increases stake in WeRide as robotaxi partnership ramps up in Dubai
item.description: Uber and WeRide have launched robotaxi operations without a human safety operator in Dubai as part of a broader expansion in the Middle East.

item.title: Guide d’achat : quels sont les meilleurs TV LG 4K et 8K en 2026 ?
item.description: LG, numéro deux des constructeurs de TV, est le maître incontesté de la technologie OLED. Pour vous aider à vous y retrouver dans ce catalogue de plus en plus étoffé, nous avons sélectionné pour vous les meilleurs téléviseurs LG du marché.

item.title: These Sony headphones are 'still the best in the business' — and they're down to a new record-low price for a very limited time
item.description: Amazon is ending its Big Spring Sale in style with a very limited time deal on the five-star Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones, bringing them down to a record-low price.

item.title: Iran Warns US Tech Firms Could Become Targets as War Expands
item.description: Companies including Google, Microsoft, and Palantir were listed as targets by Iranian media as the conflict with Israel and the US spills into digital infrastructure.

item.title: Darty retire 500 € sur ce monstre de puissance avec écran OLED à 240 Hz et RTX 5090
item.description: Si vous cherchez un PC gaming ultra-complet, voici une configuration qui vaut le détour : le Gigabyte Aorus Master 16 s’appuie sur la RTX 5090 et mise sur un écran OLED à 240 Hz pour que vous puissiez jouer en ultra dans les meilleures conditions. Bien qu'il soit très onéreux, Darty allège la facture de 500 euros.

item.title: More and more workers say they'd be happy with an AI boss — but don't expect it to give them a raise any time soon
item.description: Many Americans are accepting AI in the workplace, but they're still worried about potential job impacts.

item.title: The New ‘Supergirl’ Trailer Is Filled With Krypto, Lobo, and ’60s Soul
item.description: Milly Alcock and Jason Momoa star in the latest film from DC Studios, out June 26.

item.title: JBL Xtreme 5 et Go 5 : deux nouvelles enceintes portables qui misent sur l’IA et la connectivité
item.description: JBL annonce officiellement la nouvelle génération de deux de ses enceintes les plus populaires : la Xtreme 5 et la Go 5. Des designs revisités, l'intelligence artificielle au service du son et une étanchéité renforcée caractérisent cette double mise à jour.

item.title: Hacker hijacks Axios open-source project, used by millions, to push malware
item.description: A hacker inserted malware in Axios, an open-source web tool downloaded tens of millions of times weekly, in a widespread hack.

item.title: Vaping Comes With a Cancer Risk, Review Finds
item.description: The researchers say it's still not possible to quantify the exact risk of cancer caused by these products, however.

item.title: Coros déploie sa mise à jour de mars 2026 : enfin de vraies alternatives à Garmin PacePro et ClimbPro
item.description: Coros a présenté une nouvelle mise à jour majeure. Entre l'arrivée de la Pace Strategy pour vos records, la « Hill Alert » pour le dénivelé et un mode Hyrox qui ne dit pas son nom, le constructeur vient bousculer Garmin sur son propre terrain.

item.title: Russia moves to 'reduce VPN usage' with new blocking, fines and fees
item.description: As residents flock to VPNs to keep using Telegram, Russia's Ministry of Digital Development announced new plans to curb VPN use. Here's all we know.

item.title: Rec Room is the latest VR metaverse closure — but I have hopes it'll return in AR
item.description: 2026 gets another VR casualty as Rec Room announces shutdown, but Snap might have big AR plans for it.

item.title: The new base iPad was a no-show at Apple's March event, but it doesn’t even matter — the current model is still the best cheap tablet you can buy, and it’s on sale now
item.description: Amazon's current deal price on the iPad 11-inch (2025) means you don't need to wait for the now-overdue new model.

item.title: La Carte Vitale dématérialisée se met à jour avec une très mauvaise idée
item.description: L'application officielle de la carte Vitale vous demande désormais un mot de passe complexe. Problème, elle bloque l'accès aux gestionnaires de mots de passe et pose des problèmes d'accessibilité.

item.title: Gmail is finally letting you change your embarrassing email address — here’s how to do it on Android, iOS, and desktop
item.description: Still using your embarrassing Gmail handle? Google Account holders in the US can now change their email addresses.

item.title: FedEx chooses partnerships over proprietary tech for its automation strategy
item.description: FedEx recently announced a partnership with Berkshire Gray as the company works with external players to develop its automation tech.

item.title: Czechia vs Denmark Free Streams: TV Channels & Preview for FIFA World Cup 2026 qualifier final
item.description: Here’s how to watch Czechia vs Denmark as they face off in the Path D World Cup qualifying final.

item.title: Rec Room, a Roblox-style VR game, is shutting down
item.description:
The Roblox-like VR title Rec Room is shutting down after operating for a decade. The free-to-play social game is closing its doors because the developers "never quite figured out" how to make it profitable, despite attracting 150 million players. "We spent a long time trying to find a way to make the numbers work," the team wrote in a blog post. "But with the recent shift in the VR market, along with broader headwinds in gaming, the path to profitability has gotten tough enough that we’ve made the difficult decision to shut things down."
The shut down officially happens on June 1, but the pla...

item.title: Forfait 5G+ : quels sont les meilleurs forfaits mobiles 5G SA en 2026 ? À quel prix et chez quel opérateur ?
item.description: Quelques années après la commercialisation des premiers forfaits 5G, les quatre grands opérateurs mobiles ont déployé le standard 5G SA, ou 5G+. Quelles sont les meilleurs forfaits 5G+ / 5G SA disponibles en France en termes de prix et quel opérateur propose la meilleure offre ?

item.title: Players can 'unlock Xbox-themed interactive challenges' by buying special edition Fanta cans plus win in-game content for Call of Duty and World of Warcraft, along with console prizes
item.description: Xbox is celebrating its 25th anniversary with a Fanta collaboration with themed bottles for a collection of games, as well as new in-game content for those same titles.

item.title: The best Pokémon deals on the last day of Amazons spring sale: TCG sets under market price and more
item.description: Shop Pokémon deals in Amazon's Big Spring Sale, from TCG boxes and tins to discounted Nintendo Switch gaming accesories.

item.title: Oubliez Apple et Samsung, le smartphone le plus fou de 2026 arrive le 21 avril
item.description: Le très attendu Oppo Find X9 Ultra sera officiellement dévoilé le 21 avril prochain avec des promesses photographiques inédites. Ce lancement international historique soulève toutefois de lourdes interrogations quant à la survie des modèles phares de son petit frère OnePlus.

item.title: The best boring (but essential) deals to shop in Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: From paper towels to dishwasher pods, here are the best deals on boring but essential household goods during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale.

item.title: The best deals to shop on the last day of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon loves to manufacture an event. March is historically a dry spell for deals; however, with Amazon’s third annual Big Spring Sale, which runs through 11:59PM PT tonight, the retail behemoth is hoping to lure in would-be shoppers with the promise of steep(ish) savings and discounts on more seasonal, spring-centric items to hold folks over […]

item.title: How to Watch Artemis 2, NASA’s First Crewed Mission to the Moon in 54 Years
item.description: You don’t want to miss this historic moment.

item.title: April Full Moon 2026: See the Pink Moon
item.description: Find out when to catch the peak of the April 2026 full moon and what it's called.

item.title: Delta picks Amazon Leo for in-flight Wi-Fi starting in 2028
item.description: In-flight Wi-Fi on Delta flights will be provided by Amazon Leo beginning in 2028, the two companies have announced. In a blow to Elon Musk’s Starlink, Amazon’s deal with Delta will see its satellite internet service installed on 500 Delta aircraft initially, each equipped with its own Leo antenna. Amazon promises low-latency Wi-Fi with download speeds up to 1Gbps and upload speeds up to 400Mbps, allowing passengers to stream movies and TV shows, play games and work as if they were on the ground. If you’re a Delta SkyMiles member you’ll be able to use Leo-powered Wi-Fi for free when traveling ...

item.title: How to watch Kosovo vs Turkey: Free Streams & TV Channels for World Cup 2026 playoff qualifier final
item.description: All the ways to watch Kosovo vs Turkey live streams online – including for FREE – in the decisive World Cup 2026 playoff qualifier in Pristina.

item.title: How to watch England vs. Japan online for free
item.description: How to watch live football for free. Live stream England vs. Japan in a 2026 International Friendly for free.

item.title: Doom se lance à partir d’un serveur DNS, plus besoin d’installer le jeu
item.description: Dans la série « le jeu Doom tourne sur n'importe quoi », voici le serveur DNS. Le titre est fidèlement reproduit à partir d'un fichier texte, sans aucune installation.

item.title: Moon phase today: What the Moon will look like on March 31
item.description: See the Moon phase expected for March 31, 2026 as well as when the next Full Moon is expected.

item.title: Oracle layoffs: Stock price rises as sudden job cuts shock employees
item.description: The SaaS tech giant has been under pressure to cut costs to fund its large AI data center buildout, while also pivoting to become a cloud computing provider. Another round of layoffs has hit the tech industry, this time at SaaS giant Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL).

item.title: PlayStation 6 : 700 dollars, zéro lecteur CD et une astuce de génie pour le stockage
item.description: La PlayStation 6 ne sortira pas avant un peu plus d’un an, mais le portrait-robot qui s'esquisse promet déjà une machine résolument ancrée dans l'ère du tout dématérialisé. Entre un tarif potentiellement douloureux pour le portefeuille et une technologie miracle pour compresser vos jeux, la prochaine génération de Sony pourrait diviser.

item.title: Meta reportedly tests way to secretly watch Instagram stories
item.description: Instagram might get a paid subscription service with a few intriguing features, such as the ability to secretly watch Stories.

item.title: Walmart is running its own Spring Sale — deals are still live on Dyson, Shark, Ninja, and more top brands
item.description: Walmart has launched its spring sale to compete against Amazon's Big Spring Sale. The savings aren't as good as Amazon's, but we've plucked the best deals of out the weeds.

item.title: Meta launches new ‘prescription optimized’ smart glasses
item.description: While Meta has released several versions of its AI glasses over the last few years, today it announced it's released two new styles specifically geared toward those of us with less-than-perfect vision. Dubbed the Ray-Ban Meta Optics Styles, the new frames come in a rectangular "Blayzer" style and a circular "Scriber" version. Compared to the […]

item.title: How to watch Bosnia-Herzegovina vs Italy: Free Streams & TV Channels for World Cup 2026 playoff
item.description: All the ways to watch Bosnia-Herzegovina vs Italy live streams online – including for FREE – in the decisive World Cup 2026 playoff qualifier in Zenica.

item.title: Tax day 2026 new deductions: Filing for ‘No tax on tips’ and overtime, car loan interest, senior tax breaks could save you thousands
item.description: It’s almost April, which means the countdown is on until taxes are due. Don’t miss your chance to file for these benefits from Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill. The countdown is on: Taxpayers have a little over two weeks to file their 2025 tax returns and pay any taxes due by Wednesday, April 15, 2026. The Internal Revenue Service (IRS) expects to receive about 164 million individual income tax returns this year, with most taxpayers filing electronically....

item.title: Free Max : quelles sont les 135 destinations incluses dans le forfait illimité de Free ?
item.description: Avec Free Max, Free signe la plus grosse offre mobile sur le roaming : de la data illimitée dans plus de 135 destinations et les télécommunications sans limite dans plus de 65 pays. Envie de savoir si la destination de vos prochaines vacances figure dans la brochure de Free Max ? Ça se passe ici.

item.title: Sony’s WH-1000XM5 headphones are a whopping 39 percent off
item.description: Amazon is hosting a fantastic lightning sale on every color of the Sony WH-1000XM5 over-ear headphones, offering them for $243 (originally $399) for a limited time. This is one of the biggest price reductions we’ve ever seen. Outside of a February discount at Adorama that briefly sold them for $204.56, we haven’t seen them fall […]

item.title: TCL is taking over Sony’s TV business
item.description: After signing a nonbinding agreement in January to spin off its TV business, today Sony officially announced that TCL will pay approximately 75.4 billion yen (over $473 million) for a 51 percent stake in a new joint venture called Bravia Inc., with Sony holding the remaining 49 percent. Bravia Inc., which will be headquartered in […]

item.title: Samsung Odyssey G6 : OLED, 500 Hz et 0,03 ms, l’écran ultime des gamers est bradé à -20 %
item.description: Avec cette configuration de 500 Hz compatible avec le HDR et composée d'une dalle QD-OLED de 27 pouces, le Samsung Odyssey G6 est un superbe écran pour le gaming renforcé avec cette remise de 150 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: Think fancy HDMI cables are a waste of money? They're not — and a new fiber cable that just went viral proves it
item.description: In some scenarios, it really is worth paying for an expensive HDMI lead.

item.title: Last chance to lock in 2 months of streaming on Paramount+ for under $6
item.description: The best streaming deal of the Big Spring Sale is ending today: get two months of Paramount+ Premium for $2.99 per month.

item.title: Nothing devices are down to stupidly low prices — including the best smartwatch youve never heard of
item.description: The best deals on Nothing devices in the Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026 — get over $30 off on the Nothing Watch 3

item.title: Amazons Spring Sale ends today: We found 150+ best-ever deals on Apple, DJI, Bose, and Ninja
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale runs until March 31. Take $100 off Apple Watch Series 11, 60% off Shark robot vacuums, and Kindles for $95.

item.title: Critical Citrix NetScaler flaw gets official patch warning from CISA
item.description: CISA is giving FCEB agencies a tight deadline to patch as researchers discover evidence of abuse.
